Comprehensive Tree Care Services for Charlotte Residents

At Vibrant Trees, we provide a broad range of tree care services tailored to the needs of both residential and commercial properties in Charlotte. Our experienced professionals are equipped to handle everything from trimming and pruning to remove hazardous limbs, to complete tree removal and stump grinding.

We also offer debris cleanup and property restoration after service, making it easier for you to maintain a safe and attractive yard. Professional tree care can help preserve tree health, reduce risk from storms, and enhance your landscape’s overall appearance.

About R.E. Martin Tree Specialists, Inc.

R.E. Martin Tree Specialists, Inc. has been serving the Northern Virginia area since 1987. Founded by Russell E. Martin ('Rusty'), we are a family-owned and operated company with 38 years of experience in providing exceptional tree care services.
Tree Removal: Safe and efficient removal of trees of all sizes.
Stump Grinding: Complete removal of tree stumps to restore your landscape.
Tree Trimming & Pruning: Expert pruning and trimming to enhance tree health and appearance.
Storm Cleanup: Prompt and efficient cleanup after storms.
Land Clearing & Excavation: Site preparation for construction and development.
Demolition: Professional demolition services for residential and commercial properties.

Stump Removal Services in Northern Virginia

At R.E. Martin Tree Specialists, Inc., we provide professional stump removal services for homeowners, businesses, and property management companies throughout Northern Virginia. Whether you've recently had a tree removed or are dealing with an old, unsightly stump, our qualified tree crews are equipped to handle stumps of all sizes safely and efficiently.

Removing a stump not only improves the appearance of your property but also prevents potential hazards like tripping, pest infestations, and interference with landscaping or construction projects. Our team uses specialized equipment and proven techniques to grind and remove stumps, leaving your yard clean and ready for new growth or development.
Stump removal can be dangerous without the proper tools and expertise. Our trained crews ensure a safe process for your property and family.
We grind stumps down to below ground level and remove debris so you can replant, landscape, or pave over the area.
Old stumps attract termites, ants, and other pests. Removing them protects your home and landscape.
A clean, stump-free yard improves curb appeal and makes your property safer and more usable.

R.E. Martin Tree Specialists provides stump removal services across Northern Virginia, including Fairfax, Loudoun, Prince William, Arlington, and surrounding areas. Our experienced crews are ready to handle any residential or commercial stump removal project with precision and professionalism.

Don't let old stumps ruin the appearance or safety of your property. Call R.E. Martin Tree Specialists, Inc. today at 703-830-5500 to schedule your stump removal service or request a free consultation for your Northern Virginia property.
